***

### December 31st data uploaded incorrectly (and how to fix similar errors)

I accidentally uploaded the December 31st 2020 data to the root of the `2020` directory, instead of the root of the `!December` directory. I didn't realize until 7 commits (out of 8) in. I feel like this issue (and other similar issues) can be fixed with Git sub-modules, once I figure out how to set them up.

***
